rulings.Case Title: JUDITH ANDERSON VS. PHILIP V. LYONS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, April 21, 2009, line 10, PLAINTIFF JUDITH ANDERSON'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer to answer sustained with ten days leave to amend. Defendants must clarify their defenses with respect to the specific causes of action and supply facts supporting defenses that require facts, such as waiver, estoppel, unclean hands, laches, etc. =(302CWW/AN)

rulings.Case Title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. CAPE FEAR LAND SERVICES, INC. et al
